parsed_review.summary:
CP00-423 is a descriptor-only closeout pack (risk A, 10 units, RP13.P09.M08.S12-RP13.P09.M09.S01) covering the M08 Hermes Evidence Packet tail (9 rows) and the M09 Claude Review Packet head (1 row). Independent read-only inspection (Read/Grep/Glob) confirms the pack-level claim is supported and the pack is sound.

Verified: (1) Pack binding is consistent across registry.js (PAYMENTS_CORE_CP423_PACK_BINDING), contracts/payments-core-contract.json (current_pack + historical tail), closeout-pack-plan.json, manifest plan_binding_snapshot, and review-baseline — same risk A, 10 units, range, upstream CP00-422, next CP00-424, next_subphase RP13.P09.M09.S02, flag payments_core_p09_hermes_review_slice_descriptor_verified, gates H13/C13. (2) Distributions match across all artifacts: implementation 8 / claude_review 2, Hermes Evidence Packet 9 / Claude Review Packet 1, M08 9 rows / M09 1 row, with section row titles matching included_units. (3) service.js descriptor builders and validators.js validators are pure — no fs/network/child_process imports; freezeCp423Result forces every no-write/no-runtime/no-leak flag false/safe; the case set chains deterministically from the CP422 descriptor. (4) index.js re-exports via `export *`, so all 7 required public exports surface (index_export_check supported). (5) model.test.js and validate-rp13-payments-core-contract.mjs assert coverage, descriptor-only rows, authority boundary, and deep-equal the contract against the bindings/requirements/attestations; command-evidence records node --check, node --test, all rp05-rp13 validates, plan/weighted/spec/control-plane/goal/fullplan validates, npm test/validate/build, and git diff --check at exit 0.

Boundaries hold: production_ready false, runtime_ready false, claude_not_final_approver true, enterprise_trust_not_claimed_from_local_validation true; descriptor authority_boundary sets claude_is_final_approval false and human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening true. Hermes is used only for deterministic evidence/receipt descriptors (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt false, no_hermes_runtime_receipt true; H13 is validation-only), not product runtime. CP178+ hardening blockers are present in forbidden_review_evidence (failed_authentication_run, zero_byte_output, malformed_json_output, fenced_json_output, tool_call_shaped_output, missing refs, claude_final_approval_claim, production_enterprise_trust_claim), and the readiness auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1434-byte valid-JSON stdout, not zero-byte). No merge-conflict markers in changed files; changed-file scope matches dirty files and unrelated dirty files are correctly segregated.

The downstream closeout artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are not yet present, which is correct: they are produced after this read-only review step in the hardening sequence (baseline -> readiness -> read_only_claude_run -> normalize -> receipt_validate -> finding_adjudication -> construction_inspection -> final_closeout_validation -> commit). Pack status is implemented_pending_review; this review does not constitute final approval, and human final approval / enterprise-trust closure remain outside this receipt. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.
